title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
